files.Title: ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings
files.Summary: A collection of settings that control JSON deserialization.

files.Title: ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings
files.Summary: A collection of settings that control JSON serialization.

files.Title: ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.IJsonSerializable
files.Summary: Implemented by CIM classes to provide support for JSON serialization and deserialization.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Anchor
files.Summary: A list of anchor positions for an element on a page layout.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.AngleAlignment
files.Summary: Angle alignment types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.AnimatedSymbolEasingType
files.Summary: Represents the easing options for an animated symbol.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.AnimatedSymbolRepeatType
files.Summary: Represents the ways an animated symbol can be repeated.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.AnimationColorMode
files.Summary: Options to control how the animation color combines with symbol layer colors.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.BalloonCalloutStyle
files.Summary: Balloon callout styles.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.BillboardMode
files.Summary: A list of different billboard modes.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.BlendingMode
files.Summary: Blending modes.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.BlockProgression
files.Summary: Block progressions.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CGAAttributeType
files.Summary: CGA attribute type.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIM3DSymbolProperties
files.Summary: Represents 3D symbol properties, a collection of symbol properties that apply when the symbol is used in a 3D context.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties
files.Summary: Represents animated symbol properties, a collection of symbol properties that apply when the symbol layer has animation data.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMBackgroundCallout
files.Summary: Represents a background callout which draws a callout with an optional polygon background and leader line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMBalloonCallout
files.Summary: Represents a balloon callout. Balloon callouts are a filled background that is placed behind text. They may or may not have a leader line connecting the callout to an anchor point.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCGAAttribute
files.Summary: Represents a CGA attribute, the symbol attribute as specified by the CGA code in the rule package.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCMYKColor
files.Summary: Represents a color in the CMYK color model.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCallout
files.Summary: Represents a callout.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCharacterMarker
files.Summary: Represents a character marker.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMClippingPath
files.Summary: Represents a vector marker clipping path.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMColor
files.Summary: Supports colors in the CIM model by providing low level access to properties common amongst all color types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMColorRamp
files.Summary: Supports color ramp schemes in the CIM model by providing low level access to properties common amongst all color ramp types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMColorSpace
files.Summary: Supports colors spaces by providing a common base type for all color spaces.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMColorSubstitution
files.Summary: Represents color substitution, an ordered list of color substitutes.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCompositeCallout
files.Summary: Represents a composite callout. Composite callouts are a filled background along with an optional shadow, which is placed behind text. They may also have a leader line (consisting of one or both of a simple line, and filled dart) connecting the callout to an anchor point. Composite callouts may have additional surrounding text elements. The text representing these parts is specified in the text string using tags. Their relative position properties are specified in the CIMCompositeCallout through their corresponding CIMCompositeTextPartPosition elements specified below, but these properties can also be overridden with tag attributes.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCompositeTextPartPosition
files.Summary: Represents the text part position properties on a callout part.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMContinuousColorRamp
files.Summary: Supports continuous color ramp schemes by providing low level access to properties common amongst all continuous color ramp types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMDimensionStyle
files.Summary: Represents an dimension style which defines dimension appearance.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMExpressionInfo
files.Summary: Represents the properties required for authoring an Arcade expression.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMFill
files.Summary: Represents a fill which defines how the polygonal geometry is drawn.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMFixedColorRamp
files.Summary: Represents a color scheme composed of discrete colors.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMFontVariation
files.Summary: Represents a font variation tag name and value. This is sometimes referred to as a variation-axis tag and variation-axis value.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeneralPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents general placement properties. This is base class for general placement properties for each label engine.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffect
files.Summary: Represents a geometric effect, this is base class for all geometric effects.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectAddControlPoints
files.Summary: Represents the add control points geometric effect.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectArrow
files.Summary: Represents the arrow geometric effect which creates a dynamic line along a line feature with an arrow of a specified arrow type and width.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectBuffer
files.Summary: Represents the buffer geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon with a specified distance around features.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectCircularSector
files.Summary: Represents the circular sector geometric effect which creates a circular sector of a specified radius and start/end angles originating from a point feature.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectControlMeasureLine
files.Summary: Represents the control measure line geometric effect.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectCut
files.Summary: Represents the cut geometric effect which creates a dynamic line that is shorter on one or both ends than the line feature or polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectDashes
files.Summary: Represents the dashes geometric effect which creates a dynamic multipart line geometry from a line feature or the outline of a polygon based on a template.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectDonut
files.Summary: Represents the donut geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon ring of a specified width in relation to the outline of polygon features.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectEnclosingPolygon
files.Summary: Represents the enclosing polygon geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon from the spatial extent of a line or polygon feature.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectExtension
files.Summary: Represents the extension geometric effect which creates a dynamic line that is extended from either the beginning or the end of the line feature at a specified deflection angle and length.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectJog
files.Summary: Represents the jog geometric effect which creates a dynamic line with a jog of a specified angle, position, and width in the line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectLocalizerFeather
files.Summary: Represents a geometric effect which creates a localizer feather for aeronautical charts.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectMove
files.Summary: Represents the move geometric effect which creates a point, line or polygon that is offset a specified distance in X and Y.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectOffset
files.Summary: Represents the offset geometric effect which creates a dynamic line or polygon offset at a specified distance perpendicularly from a feature.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectOffsetHatch
files.Summary: Represents a geometric effect which creates a hatch pattern to depict special use airspace for aeronautical charts.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectOffsetTangent
files.Summary: Represents the offset tangent geometric effect which creates a dynamic line along a line feature offset in the direction defined by either the beginning or the end of the line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectRadial
files.Summary: Represents the radial geometric effect which creates a dynamic line of a specified length and angle originating from a point feature.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectRegularPolygon
files.Summary: Represents the regular polygon geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon around a point feature with a specified number of edges. All edges are equal in length and all angles are equal.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectReverse
files.Summary: Represents the reverse geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon around a point feature with a specified number of edges. All edges are equal in length and all angles are equal.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectRotate
files.Summary: Represents the rotate geometric effect which creates a dynamic line or polygon rotated a specified angle from the feature.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectScale
files.Summary: Represents the rotate geometric effect which creates a dynamic line or polygon scaled by a specified factor. Vertices are moved in relation to the center point of a feature envelope. Values greater than 1 move vertices away from the center point. Values between 0 and 1 move vertices toward the center point. Values less than 0 draw an inverse dynamic line or polygon where the vertices have crossed to the other side of the center point.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectSuppress
files.Summary: Represents the suppress geometric effect which creates a dynamic line that hides sections of a stroke between pairs control points.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectTaperedPolygon
files.Summary: Represents the tapered polygon geometric effect which creates a dynamic polygon along a line feature, whose width varies by two specified amounts along its length, as defined by a percentage of the line feature's length.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGeometricEffectWave
files.Summary: Represents the wave geometric effect which creates a dynamic line or polygon along a feature with a repeating wave pattern.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGradientFill
files.Summary: Represents a gradient fill which fills polygonal geometry with a specified color scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGradientStroke
files.Summary: Represents a gradient stroke which draws linear geometry with a specified color scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGraphic
files.Summary: Represents a graphic.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGraphicFrame
files.Summary: Represents a graphic frame.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMGrayColor
files.Summary: Represents a grayscale color defined by lightness.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMHSLColor
files.Summary: Represents a color defined by hue, saturation, and lightness.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMHSVColor
files.Summary: Represents a color defined by hue, saturation, and brightness (value).

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMHatchFill
files.Summary: Represents a hatch fill which fills polygonal geometry with a uniform series of parallel line symbols.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMICCColorSpace
files.Summary: Represents a color space defined by an International Color Consortium (ICC) color profile.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLABColor
files.Summary: Represents a color defined in the LAB color space.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLabelClass
files.Summary: Represents a label class which describes how to generate a set of text labels from a group of features in a feature layer.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLabelClassProperties
files.Summary: Represents label class properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLabelPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents label placement properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLeader
files.Summary: Represents the generic base type for leaders.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLeaderLine
files.Summary: Represents a leader line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLeaderPoint
files.Summary: Represents a leader point.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineCallout
files.Summary: Represents a line callout.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a line symbol which is used to draw polyline features or graphics.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLinearContinuousColorRamp
files.Summary: Represents a linear continuous color ramp scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexDictionary
files.Summary: Represents a Maplex dictionary.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexDictionaryEntry
files.Summary: Represents a Maplex dictionary entry.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexExternalZonePriorities
files.Summary: Represents Maplex external zone priorities.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexGeneralPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents Maplex general placement properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexInternalZonePriorities
files.Summary: Represents Maplex internal zone priorities.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexKeyNumberGroup
files.Summary: Represents a Maplex key number group.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexLabelPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents Maplex label placement properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexLabelStackingProperties
files.Summary: Represents Maplex label stacking properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexOffsetAlongLineProperties
files.Summary: Represents Maplex offset along the line properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexRotationProperties
files.Summary: Represents Maplex rotation properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexStackingSeparator
files.Summary: Represents a Maplex stacking separator.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaplexStrategyPriorities
files.Summary: Represents Maplex strategy priorities.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker
files.Summary: Represents a marker which is a self-contained shape or image that can draw for a point graphic or placed in a repeating arrangement along a stroke or within a fill. It can be a glyph from a font, a picture, a collection of vector geometries, or a 3D model.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerFillPlacement
files.Summary: Represents a marker fill placement.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic
files.Summary: Represents a marker graphic which is used to define vector graphics in a vector marker.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacement
files.Summary: Represents a marker placement.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine
files.Summary: Represents marker placement along the line which defines how a marker is placed along a line or polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize
files.Summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places randomly sized markers evenly along a line or polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize
files.Summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places markers that are the same size evenly along a line or polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize
files.Summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places markers in either increasing, decreasing or alternating gradations along a line or polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAroundPolygon
files.Summary: Represents marker placement around polygon which places a marker on a specific position on the polygon outline.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAtExtremities
files.Summary: Represents marker placement at extremities which places markers at only one or both endpoints of a line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAtMeasuredUnits
files.Summary: Represents marker placement at geometry M values.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAtRatioPositions
files.Summary: Represents marker placement at ratio positions which places a set number of markers along the line or the outline of a polygon.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementInsidePolygon
files.Summary: Represents marker placement inside a polygon which defines how a polygon is filled with a pattern of markers.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementOnLine
files.Summary: Represents a marker placement on the line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementOnVertices
files.Summary: Represents a marker placement on vertices which places a single marker on a line or polygon outline at a set distance from the middle or one of the endpoints.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementPolygonCenter
files.Summary: Represents marker placement polygon center which defines how a single marker will be placed within the polygon.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerStrokePlacement
files.Summary: Represents a marker stroke placement.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMaterialSymbolLayer
files.Summary: Represents a material which defines how the multipatch or mesh is drawn.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMeshEdge
files.Summary: Represents a stroke drawn at specified edges of a mesh.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMeshSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a mesh symbol which is used to draw multipatch features or mesh features.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMultiLayerSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a multilayer symbol, a generic type for point, line, and polygon symbols, specifying that they can contain more than one symbol layers.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMultipartColorRamp
files.Summary: Represents a multipart color ramp scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMObject
files.Summary: Represents the base CIM object class.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMParagraphTextGraphic
files.Summary: Represents a paragraph text graphic.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill
files.Summary: Represents a picture fill which fills polygonal geometry with a picture. Supported file types are .bmp, .jpg, .png, and .gif.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker
files.Summary: Represents a picture marker created from a raster (bitmapped) image file. The image can have color substitutions to replace one or more colors in the image or it can have a tint applied to the whole image depending on the picture type. Supported formats are .bmp, .jpg, .png, and .gif.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureStroke
files.Summary: Represents a picture stroke which draws linear geometry with a repeating image file. Supported file types are .bmp, .jpg, .png, and .gif.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPointSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a point symbol used to draw point features and point graphics.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPointSymbolCallout
files.Summary: Represents a point symbol callout which draws a point symbol as the background and a line symbol for leaders. Often used for highway shields.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPolarContinuousColorRamp
files.Summary: Represents a polar continuous color ramp scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPolygonSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a polygon symbol which is used to draw polygon features or polygon graphics.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPrimitiveOverride
files.Summary: Represents a primitive override.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMProceduralSymbolLayer
files.Summary: Represents a procedural symbol layer which defines rendering using script-based logic to construct complex 3D objects and textures from simple geometries. Properties of the symbol are derived from a rule package (.rpk file).

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMRGBColor
files.Summary: Represents a color in the RGB color model.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMRandomHSVColorRamp
files.Summary: Represents a random HSV color ramp scheme.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMScaleDependentSizeVariation
files.Summary: Represents the scale dependent size variations for a symbol reference.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMShapeVertex
files.Summary: Represents a shape vertex.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMShapeVertices
files.Summary: Represents shape vertices.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSimpleLineCallout
files.Summary: Represents a simple line callout for drawing basic leader lines.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSolidFill
files.Summary: Represents a solid fill which fills polygonal geometry with a single solid color.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSolidMeshEdge
files.Summary: Represents a stroke drawn at specified edges of a mesh using solid color.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSolidStroke
files.Summary: Represents a solid stroke which draws linear geometry with a single solid color.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSpotColor
files.Summary: Represents a spot color.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSpotColorSpace
files.Summary: Represents a color space for spot colors.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStandardGeneralPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents standard label engine general placement properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStandardLabelPlacementProperties
files.Summary: Represents standard label engine label placement properties.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStandardLineLabelPosition
files.Summary: Represents standard label engine line label position.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStandardLineLabelPriorities
files.Summary: Represents standard label engine line label priorities.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStandardPointPlacementPriorities
files.Summary: Represents standard label engine point placement priorities.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke
files.Summary: Represents a stroke which defines how line geometry or the outline of polygon geometry is drawn.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a symbol. A symbol is used to describe how a geometric shape, such as that from a graphic or feature, is displayed.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimation
files.Summary: Represents an animation of a symbol, this is the base class for all animations.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationColor
files.Summary: Represents the color animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine
files.Summary: Represents the move along line animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationOffset
files.Summary: Represents the offset animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationRotation
files.Summary: Represents the rotation animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationScale
files.Summary: Represents the scale animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationSize
files.Summary: Represents the size animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationTransparency
files.Summary: Represents the transparency animation.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolIdentifier
files.Summary: Represents a symbol identifier.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer
files.Summary: Represents a symbol layer. Symbol layers are the components that make up a symbol. A symbol layer is represented by a stroke, fill, marker, or procedural symbol layer.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolReference
files.Summary: Represents a symbol reference.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextGraphic
files.Summary: Represents a text graphic.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextGraphicBase
files.Summary: Represents a text graphic base class, the generic base class for text based graphics.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextMargin
files.Summary: Represents a text margin which defines the margin to apply around text.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol
files.Summary: Represents a text symbol which is used to draw text graphics, bleeds, and annotation. Text symbols do not contain any symbol layers but can have callouts.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker
files.Summary: Represents a vector marker which can represent vector graphics. It's constructed from MarkerGraphics which are geometries and symbols used as building blocks for the marker.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMWaterFill
files.Summary: Represents a water fill which fills polygonal geometry with animated water.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMXYZColor
files.Summary: Represents a color in the XYZ color model.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMglTFMarker3D
files.Summary: Represents a marker symbol for 3D objects.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ClippingType
files.Summary: Clipping types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ColorSpaceType
files.Summary: Specifies color spaces used for colors.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DimensionMarkerFit
files.Summary: Dimension marker fit options.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DimensionPartOptions
files.Summary: Dimension part options.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DimensionTextFit
files.Summary: Dimension text fit options.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DimensionTextOption
files.Summary: Dimension text options.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DimensionType
files.Summary: Dimension types supported by dimension features.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.DominantSizeAxis
files.Summary: Specifies the dominant size axis types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ExpressionReturnType
files.Summary: Return types for Arcade expressions.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ExternalColorMixMode
files.Summary: Options to control how material combines with externally defined colors.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ExtremityPlacement
files.Summary: Extremity placement options which specify at which ends of the line a marker will be placed.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FeaturesToLabel
files.Summary: A list of types of features to label.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FillMode
files.Summary: Fill modes.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FixedColorRampArrangementType
files.Summary: Specifies the arrangement type for fixed color ramp.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FontEffects
files.Summary: Font effects.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FontEncoding
files.Summary: Font encodings.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FontType
files.Summary: Font types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectArrowType
files.Summary: Geometric effect arrow types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectControlMeasureLineRule
files.Summary: Specifies the rules to transform the input ground control points given as a line.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectDonutMethod
files.Summary: Geometric effect donut methods.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectEnclosingPolygonMethod
files.Summary: Geometric effect enclosing polygon methods.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectExtensionOrigin
files.Summary: Geometric effect extension origins. Specifies the origin of the extension to add to the line. The beginning and end of the line is defined by the direction the line was digitized.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectLocalizerFeatherStyle
files.Summary: Geometric effect localizer feather styles.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffsetMethod
files.Summary: Geometric effect offset method which specifies the way the strokes or fills are displayed at corners.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffsetOption
files.Summary: Geometric effect offset options which specify the way the symbol handles complex geometries.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffsetTangentMethod
files.Summary: Geometric effect offset tangent methods which specify the origin of the tangent offset for the line. The beginning and end of the lines are defined by how the line was digitized.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectWaveform
files.Summary: Geometric effect offset waveforms.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GlyphHinting
files.Summary: Glyph hinting options.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientAlignment
files.Summary: Gradient alignment types.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientFillMethod
files.Summary: Describes the gradient fill method which is how the gradient is applied.

files.Title: ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientStrokeMethod
files.Summary: The different methods of gradient strokes.
